content: Ambiente para Q&A de volume de recebíveis antecipados por mês.

instruction: WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests 'antecipações' or volume of receivables that have completed their liquidation. SCOPE_TABLES: fato_recebiveis. RISK_IF_MISUSED: If used as a global default, would exclude non-liquidated statuses even when broader analysis is desired.

WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests statistics or aggregates for 'este ano', 'this year', or wants the latest annual results. SCOPE_TABLES: Any table with a suitable date column (here, fato_recebiveis.data). TIMEFRAME_HINT: Calendar year matching system date. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Using this as a default can omit past years or more flexible windows.

sql: fato_recebiveis.data >= date_trunc('MONTH', dateadd(MONTH, -2, CURRENT_DATE)) AND fato_recebiveis.data <= CURRENT_DATE
instruction: WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests 'últimos 3 meses', 'last 3 months', or similar rolling time window; SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis; TIMEFRAME_HINT: Includes full months, from the start of the month two months ago through today (inclusive); RISK_IF_MISUSED: Not a default, do not use for other arbitrary date intervals.

WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests antecipated/antecipados receivables (e.g., for promo volume); SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis; RISK_IF_MISUSED: Using this as a default may undercount volumes if business definition of anticipation changes.
WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests 'antecipados' or antecipated receivables. SCOPE_TABLES: fato_recebiveis. RISK_IF_MISUSED: May undercount if business status mapping changes.

sql: fato_recebiveis.data >= date_trunc('MONTH', dateadd(MONTH, -2, CURRENT_DATE)) AND fato_recebiveis.data <= CURRENT_DATE
instruction: WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests 'últimos 3 meses', 'last 3 months', or similar rolling period; SCOPE_TABLES: fato_recebiveis; TIMEFRAME_HINT: Includes full months (from start of month two months ago through today); RISK_IF_MISUSED: Using as a default for other intervals may misrepresent the window.

WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests 'recebíveis antecipados' or 'antecipados' in volume/amount questions; SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis; RISK_IF_MISUSED: Not a global default for receivables, only use for 'antecipated' cases.

WHEN_TO_USE: Use for 'últimos 3 meses', 'last 3 months' rolling-period questions; SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis; TIMEFRAME_HINT: Window includes full months, beginning at the start of two months ago, ending today. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Not for other arbitrary timeframes.

sql: fato_recebiveis.data >= date_trunc('MONTH', dateadd(MONTH, -2, CURRENT_DATE)) AND fato_recebiveis.data <= CURRENT_DATE
instruction: WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests 'últimos 3 meses' or 'last 3 months', and needs a rolling window that includes all dates from the start of two months ago up to the current system date (inclusive). SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis. TIMEFRAME_HINT: Covers complete months plus current partial month up to today. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Using a window ending at next month's start (as in baseline) will incorrectly include future dates and inflate results.

sql: fato_recebiveis.data >= date_trunc('MONTH', dateadd(MONTH, -2, CURRENT_DATE)) AND fato_recebiveis.data <= CURRENT_DATE
instruction: WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests 'últimos 3 meses' or 'last 3 months', and needs a rolling window that includes all dates from the start of two months ago up to the current system date (inclusive). SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis. TIMEFRAME_HINT: Covers complete months plus current partial month up to today. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Using a window ending at next month's start (as in baseline) will incorrectly include future dates and inflate results.

WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests volume/metrics for 'registered receivables' or uses terms like 'registrado', as in 'recebíveis registrados' or 'volume registrado'. SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Only use when aiming to limit to registered (not liquidated, antecipated, etc.); not a universal default for all receivables.

WHEN_TO_USE: Whenever user requires counts or aggregations where missing 'data' field would undercut the calculation's integrity; SCOPE_TABLES: fato_recebiveis; RISK_IF_MISUSED: Treating as a global default could unnecessarily suppress data if design guarantees non-nulls, but critical if recent data could be partially incomplete or in ETL transition.

WHEN_TO_USE: Use when calculating the sum/total/volume of receivables if missing (NULL) values in 'valor' would distort financial aggregates; SCOPE_TABLES: fato_recebiveis; RISK_IF_MISUSED: Not always required if ETL/business guarantees no NULLs, but essential for data quality during partial loads or data migration phases.

WHEN_TO_USE: Use this filter whenever results must be grouped or segmented by cedente (cedente_id), i.e., in 'por cedente' or 'by cedente' questions. SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis. RISK_IF_MISUSED: If omitted, NULL cedente_id rows may aggregate into a meaningless 'unknown' group, distorting total volumes or segment counts.

WHEN_TO_USE: For monthly reporting or aggregations based on registration date; SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis; TIMEFRAME_HINT: Uses calendar months, not fiscal or rolling periods. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Using other truncation types (week, year) would lead to different time grouping granularity.

WHEN_TO_USE: When calculating the total value of receivables that match business-qualifying filters (liquidated, this year, etc). SCOPE_TABLES: fato_recebiveis. RISK_IF_MISUSED: If filters are omitted, could result in overcounting.

WHEN_TO_USE: When user requests monthly total registered receivables per cedente, as in questions about 'monthly volume' or 'volume registrado por mês'. SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis; GROUPING_HINT: Requires grouping both by month (truncated from date) and cedente_id. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Using this measure without monthly grouping will aggregate across all months and lose time granularity.

measures.display_name: monthly volume of registered receivables by cedente
instruction: WHEN_TO_USE: When the user asks for the total value of registered receivables per cedente for each month, i.e., for 'monthly volume by cedente'; SCOPE_TABLES: dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis; GROUPING_HINT: Requires grouping by both month (truncated registration date) and cedente_id. RISK_IF_MISUSED: Omitting GROUP BY or the status filter may cause overaggregation or include unregistered receivables.

question: Qual é o valor total dos recebíveis?

content: SELECT SUM(valor) AS valor_total FROM dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis

question: Quantos recebíveis existem na tabela de recebíveis?

content: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_recebiveis FROM dev_recebiveis.diamond.fato_recebiveis
